title: The Wilder Forest Custom GUI Pack
description: The Wilder Forest Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/SoqWkel.png)** **This is a GUI packed themed towards the wild life, everyone once in a while needs to touch grass and lucky for you I have made that possible. Really worked hard on this pack , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Menu Option** **Options** ![The Wilder Forest Custom GUI Pack Minecraft Texture Pack](https://i.imgur.com/EtcGbFn.png) ![The Wilder Forest Custom GUI Pack Minecraft Texture Pack](https://i.imgur.com/DfvrLBY.png) **In game Menu** **Hud** ![The Wilder Forest Custom GUI Pack Minecraft Texture Pack](https://i.imgur.com/ltT2FyH.png) **Inventory** ![](https://i.imgur.com/0NfIyQ8.png) **Anvil** ![](https://i.imgur.com/nZX193o.png) **Large Chest** ![](https://i.imgur.com/I1BwLIs.png) **Shulker Box** ![](https://i.imgur.com/GdEqGFS.png) **Brewing Stand** ![](https://i.imgur.com/2KRrkSi.png) **Beacon Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/mSSYeZB.png) **Villager Trading Option** ![](https://i.imgur.com/lVKZoUw.png) [** ![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
